# Adil Waheed - Full-Stack MERN Developer Portfolio

> Full-Stack MERN Developer (FE Focused) | Frontend Developer | React.js Developer | Next.js Developer | WordPress Developer | AI Automation Specialist

## About

Full-Stack MERN Developer (FE Focused) with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications using React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB, with strong frontend expertise. 

### Specializations:
- **Frontend Development**: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript
- **Full-Stack MERN**: MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js
- **WordPress Development**: Custom themes, Elementor, plugin integration
- **AI Automation**: N8N workflows, OpenAI API integration (Entry-Mid Level)

Skilled in developing responsive UI from Figma designs, building secure RESTful APIs, implementing JWT authentication, and integrating real-time features using Socket.io. Experienced in state management (Redux, Zustand), API integration, performance optimization, Chrome extensions, and WordPress development (Elementor). Familiar with CI/CD, Docker, and AI/N8N automation. Focused on clean code, scalable architecture, and high-performance user experiences.

## Featured Projects

### ExactFlow App (2025)
A comprehensive business management platform built with Next.js, featuring multiple modules for HR, finance, sales, and operations.
- URL: https://app.exactflow.pl/
- Tech: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Material-UI, Redux, Zustand, Socket.io, N8N
- Role: Full Stack MERN Developer - Led development and maintenance of PeopleForce module

### Tribl.app (2023)
A creator-first social platform where creativity meets community and passion fuels engagement.
- URL: https://tribl.app
- Tech: Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, OpenAI, Tailwind CSS
- Role: Full Stack Developer - Implemented AI-powered content validation using OpenAI

### Azz AI - Chrome Extension (2023)
Chrome Extension for Azz Medical Associates integrating TalkeHR and AI service to enhance employee productivity.
- URL: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/azz-ai/mgcafekbmfbamkacdoehfpieihdbcdkm
- Tech: React.js, Chrome Extension APIs, JavaScript
- Role: Frontend Developer

### Azz Appointments (2022)
Appointment booking web application for Azz Medical Associates with TalkeHR integration.
- URL: https://azzappointments.com/
- Tech: Next.js, React.js, Redux, JavaScript
- Role: Full Stack Developer

### 92 Limo (2022)
Cab booking web application with real-time ride search and booking capabilities.
- URL: https://92limo.com/
- Tech: React.js, React Router DOM, HTML5, CSS3
- Role: Frontend Developer

## Work Experience

### Exact Solution Electronics (04/2025 - Present)
Full-Stack MERN Developer (Frontend-Focused) - Remote
- Developed modern, scalable web applications using Next.js, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB
- Built high-performance dashboards and responsive user interfaces with optimized architecture
- Implemented real-time features using WebSocket and Socket.io
- Led development and maintenance of the PeopleForce module
- Conducted code reviews and mentored junior developers
- Implemented N8N automation workflows

### Devopsifi (09/2023 - 04/2025)
Full-Stack MERN Developer (Frontend-Focused) - Remote
- Developed and maintained full-stack MERN applications
- Converted Figma UI/UX designs into responsive interfaces
- Built secure RESTful APIs with JWT authentication
- Implemented real-time features using Socket.io
- Optimized MongoDB schemas and queries

### Prime Health Services Pakistan (07/2022 - 08/2023)
Frontend Developer (React.js & Next.js) - On-Site
- Developed Chrome Extension using React.js
- Built responsive appointment booking system using Next.js
- Collaborated with backend teams to optimize data flow

### Dowell Research UK Limited (11/2021 - 06/2022)
Frontend Developer (React.js & Next.js) - Remote
- Developed dynamic user interfaces using React.js and Next.js
- Integrated internal and third-party APIs using Axios
- Built responsive UI components using Tailwind CSS
